Wholesale Products

Baked Fresh.
Delivered Nationwide.

Every product ships frozen with a 270-day shelf life — thaw and serve. Available through major food service distributors or direct from our Ybor City bakery.

The Original

Cuban Bread

Authentic Cuban Bread
18" & 36"

Crusty on the outside, soft on the inside. Made from high-gluten spring wheat flour created specifically for our bakery, finished with a freshly cut palmetto leaf that creates the signature split. The foundation of every authentic Cuban sandwich. Zero trans fat.

18" Pack Size24 loaves / case  ·  8 oz each
36" Pack Size20 loaves / case  ·  16 oz each
Shelf Life270 days frozen  ·  0°F storage
ServiceThaw & serve  ·  350° oven 2–3 min
AllergensWheat
Frozen Nationwide Sysco · US Foods Direct Wholesale
↓ 18" Spec Sheet ↓ 36" Spec Sheet Get Pricing

Honey Wheat 18" also available — 51% whole wheat, honey instead of sugar. Item #039456. Perfect for schools, hospitals, and health-forward menus. ↓ Spec Sheet

Hoagie Rolls

Media Noche
Hoagie Rolls

Named after Havana’s late-night club scene, Media Noche is made with real eggs for a soft interior, subtle sweetness, and characteristic golden color. The classic foundation for the Cuban-style pressed sandwich. Equally excellent with turkey, ham, or any pressed application.

Pack Size36 pieces / case  ·  8 inches  ·  3.25 oz each
Item #000168
Shelf Life270 days frozen  ·  0°F storage
ServiceThaw & serve  ·  Not sliced
AllergensWheat, Eggs
Frozen Nationwide Sysco · US Foods
↓ Spec Sheet Get Pricing

Hamburger Buns

Coca Hamburger Buns
4"

Hand-rolled, Spanish-style sweet bun — the sweetest of all our breads. Made with sugar for a pillowy interior and tremendous flavor. Pre-sliced and ready to serve. Pairs perfectly with burgers, pulled pork, and pressed sandwiches.

Pack Size4 × 12 (48 buns / case)  ·  3.25 oz each
Item #000894
Shelf Life270 days frozen  ·  0°F storage
ServiceThaw, toast & serve  ·  Pre-sliced
AllergensWheat
Frozen Nationwide Direct Wholesale
↓ Spec Sheet Get Pricing

Fresh Daily  ·  Tampa Bay Area

Tampa’s
Hoagie Roll

Fresh-baked and delivered daily to Tampa Bay’s restaurants, delis, and sandwich shops. No freezing, no distributor markup. The same craft that goes into our Cuban bread, applied to your entire roll lineup.

Talk to Giuseppe
Fresh delivery available to Tampa Bay area only. Contact Giuseppe for delivery schedule and coverage confirmation.

Deli & Bucket Breads

Six Varieties.
Every Format.

Our full lineup of artisan deli loaves and bucket breads, available in small, large, and large round formats. The same La Segunda craft applied to your entire bread menu — white, wheat, rye, marble, sourdough, and pumpernickel.

White Wheat Rye Marble Sourdough Pumpernickel

Formats: Small Deli  ·  Large Deli  ·  Large Deli Round

Bucket Breads — all six varieties available sliced in 1/2”  ·  5/8”  ·  3/4” cut sizes
